title: Hiring Real Estate Agent at DLF

jsonLd.title: Hiring Real Estate Agent at DLF
jsonLd.description:
We at DLF are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Ludhiana. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About DLF:
DLF is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DLF!
